metadata.description: Resource naming prefix (lowercase, no hyphens for storage)
azd service name for deployment targeting
azd service name for deployment targeting
Placeholder custom domains (for multi-subdomain demo config)
Base domain for placeholder custom domains

input.note: [format('Placeholder — configure DNS CNAME to {0}', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/afdEndpoints', format('{0}-afd', parameters('prefix')), format('{0}-endpoint', parameters('prefix'))), '2024-02-01').hostName)]

metadata.description: Container Apps Environment name for origin A
Container Apps Environment name for origin B

resources.name: [guid(resourceGroup().id, format('{0}-afd-traffic-workbook', parameters('prefix')))]
resources.tags: [union(parameters('tags'), createObject('hidden-title', format('{0} Front Door Traffic Analytics', parameters('prefix'))))]

properties.serializedData:
[string(createObject('version', 'Notebook/1.0', 'items', createArray(createObject('type', 1, 'content', createObject('json', '# Front Door Traffic Analytics
---
This workbook provides traffic, latency, and cache analytics for the Azure Front Door Premium profile.'), 'name', 'header'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'Request Volume (5-min bins)', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'requestVolume'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| summarize P50=percentile(todouble(timeTaken_s), 50), P95=percentile(todouble(timeTaken_s), 95), P99=percentile(todouble(timeTaken_s), 99) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'Latency Percentiles (P50, P95, P99)', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'latencyPercentiles'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| extend IsHit = cacheStatus_s has "HIT"
| summarize Total = count(), Hits = countif(IsHit) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend HitRatio = round(100.0 * Hits / Total, 1)
| project TimeGenerated, HitRatio
| render timechart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'Cache Hit Ratio (%)', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'cacheHitRatio'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| summarize Count = count() by httpStatusCode_d
| order by Count desc
| render piechart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'HTTP Status Code Distribution', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'statusCodes'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorAccessLog"
| summarize Requests = count() by clientCountry_s
| top 20 by Requests
| render barchart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'Top 20 Countries by Request Volume', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'geoDistribution'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorHealthProbeLog"
| summarize HealthyCount = countif(httpStatusCode_d >= 200 and httpStatusCode_d < 400), UnhealthyCount = countif(httpStatusCode_d >= 400 or httpStatusCode_d == 0) by origin_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'Origin Health Probe Results', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'originHealth')), 'isLocked', false()))]

resources.name: [guid(resourceGroup().id, format('{0}-waf-security-workbook', parameters('prefix')))]
resources.tags: [union(parameters('tags'), createObject('hidden-title', format('{0} WAF Security Analytics', parameters('prefix'))))]

properties.serializedData:
[string(createObject('version', 'Notebook/1.0', 'items', createArray(createObject('type', 1, 'content', createObject('json', '# WAF Security Analytics
---
This workbook provides Web Application Firewall analytics including blocked requests, rule triggers, and attack sources.'), 'name', 'header'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| summarize Count = count() by action_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'WAF Actions Over Time (Block / Allow / Log)', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'wafActions'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Block"
| summarize BlockedRequests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'Blocked Requests Over Time', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'blockedRequests'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Block"
| summarize Count = count() by ruleName_s
| top 10 by Count
| render barchart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'Top 10 WAF Rules Triggered (Blocked)', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'topRules'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Block"
| summarize Count = count() by clientIP_s
| top 20 by Count
| render barchart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'Top 20 Blocked Source IPs', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'topBlockedIPs'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| summarize Count = count() by policyName_s, action_s
| render barchart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'WAF Policy Actions Summary', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'policyActions'), createObject('type', 3, 'content', createObject('version', 'KqlItem/1.0', 'query', 'AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.CDN" and Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Block"
| summarize Count = count() by clientCountry_s
| top 10 by Count
| render piechart', 'size', 0, 'title', 'Blocked Requests by Country', 'timeContext', createObject('durationMs', 86400000), 'queryType', 0, 'resourceType', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'crossComponentResources', createArray(parameters('workspaceId'))), 'name', 'blockedByCountry')), 'isLocked', false()))]

resources.name: [guid(resourceGroup().id, format('{0}-afd-workbook', parameters('prefix')))]
resources.tags: [union(parameters('tags'), createObject('hidden-title', format('{0} Front Door CDN WAF Dashboard', parameters('prefix'))))]

properties.displayName: [format('{0} Front Door CDN WAF Dashboard', parameters('prefix'))]
